name: Ninja Ming
short_description: In this 2d precision platformer with a teleportation twist, play as Ninja Ming and embark on the Path of Trials. Dash through 241 levels using dynamic teleportation and diverse ninjutsu skills. Conquer challenges with style—growing stronger at every turn.
detailed_description:
Ninja Ming is a precision platformer with a teleportation twist. Play as Ming the ninja and take on the Path of Trial through 8 chapters and 241 levels. 

Dash? Flash! Teleportation is Key.

Throw a kunai and instantly teleport to its location!

Ninja Ming relies heavily on the move of teleportation. Once mastered, you’ll be commanding the air and dashing through the challenging areas.

Build Your Ninjutsu Skillset

"Flash" is just the beginner skill! As you progress through levels, you'll unlock even more dazzling abilities: use "ExFlash" for long-range teleportation, destroy (or build) terrain with "Fireball" and "Rock," and find creative solutions with "Replacement Dash"

Each terrain presents unique puzzles - Use your skill combinations to plan the best routes and maximize your mobility

Exploration + Puzzles = Scrolls

While dashing forward, don’t forget to explore—each room contains collectible "scrolls"! Find different ways to unlock them - "Flash Scrolls" requires multiple Flashes to unlock, "Treasure Chest Scrolls" can only be opened with keys, "Timed Scrolls" tests your aerial ability, and "Secret Scrolls" are tucked away in corners. 

Ninja Ming’s Growth

Three years ago, with the appearance of a time-space rift, natural disasters struck the ninja world. Ninja Mirror and the Four Ninjas sealed the rift together but were never seen again since. Three years later, a ninja named "Ming" inherits the will of the ninjas and embarks on his trial journey, searching for Mirror, and undergoing his own transformation.

The game does not have any form of stats growth. It'll only be you and your controls. Keep growing, and you shall master precision, speed, and style!

Game Features:

  • Assist Mode: You can adjust the game speed to a minimum of 0.3x.

  • Anecdotes: Keep track of your encounters and acquired ninjutsu.

  • Speedrun Mode: Unlocks after completing any area. You will be timed in this mode. Welcome speedrunners! (Current world record for the first chapter "Forest" is 102.73s, held by Tichat002).

  • Smooth Controls: Precise control over movement and skills.

  • Instant Respawn: Quickly respawn and resume the challenge after failure.

  • Eight Areas: Forming the ultimate trial for aspiring ninjas.

  • Dynamic Electronic Music (by 4 Channels Club): Keeps your cool.

  • Scroll Portal: Complete the first 4 chapters to unlock, and enter the next 4 chapters of Inner World

  • Hidden Achievements, and plenty of Easter Eggs!

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Spanish - Latin America
